report.summary: Day 52 standup v10 (10:06 CET): Full rotation since v9. 400 PUBLISHED_PAGES (+2: Hyperliquid + Crypto Oracles promoted by publish-v3). Build-v7 shipped Sui Blockchain Guide + Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing (2 new guides). Design-v7 polished 3 pages. Community-v8 launched BTC $75K social suite (6 tweets + Discord + newsletter). BTC holding $75K+, F&G 30+ (recovering). FOMC decision TOMORROW 2pm ET — rate limiter still 0/6. Git locks ~22h stale, 556 uncommitted files. Vercel trial now ~8 days (per EOD-v7). 42 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v9 Standup (09:09)
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 398 → 400 (+2 this cycle). Publish-v3 promoted Hyperliquid ecosystem guide + Crypto Oracles 2026 guide from PUBLISH_QUEUE. Production still running cb65a9d (Day 42) — pages in file, NOT live until git lock clears.

New content this cycle (build-v7): Sui Blockchain Guide 2026 (architecture, ecosystem, tokenomics — filling major L1 coverage gap) + Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing Guide 2026 (strategies, tools, tax implications). Both need to be promoted to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Design-v7: UX polish applied to 3 learn guides — converted static FAQs to accordion pattern, ARIA landmarks + semantic nav, removed hardcoded backgrounds, verified OG image coverage via dynamic API. Pages are clean and accessible.

Community-v8: BTC $75K social campaign deployed — $75K breakout infographic created (6-week high, 25% recovery from Feb $60K bottom), 6 tweets drafted, Discord briefing written, DEGEN CORNER newsletter insert drafted. ETF 6-day inflow streak ($962.8M since Mar 9).

Market snapshot: BTC ~$75K+ (6-week high, +3.8% 24h). F&G recovering through 30+ (up from all-time low of 5). ETF inflows accelerating. Strategy Inc. holding 738,731 BTC (targeting 1M). $540M+ shorts liquidated.
FOMC: Meeting is UNDERWAY. Decision TOMORROW ~2pm ET. Dot plot will be the signal for crypto. Our FOMC & Crypto Guide is still in queue — undeployed due to git lock.
EOD-v7 (positive delta): 15+ successful Vercel redeploys today. All API routes healthy with caching. Vercel trial now ~8 days remaining (per EOD-v7 — more runway than feared in earlier cycles).

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v9
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6) since v9 ✅ — publish + build-v7 + design-v7 + community-v8 + eod-v7 all ran. Today: 42 total agent reports (v10 standup now 43).
SHIPPED this cycle ✅ — 2 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (400 total), 2 new guides built (Sui + Portfolio Rebalancing), 3 pages UX polished, BTC $75K social campaign live, Vercel redeploys healthy.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock + HEAD.lock — NOW ~22 HOURS STALE. Created Mar 16 ~11:17 CET. 556 uncommitted files. SINGLE ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — then agents can commit + push → auto-deploy 400 pages.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate Limiter 0/6 — FOMC TOMORROW 2pm ET. checkRateLimit() exists, wired to ZERO API routes. 19th+ consecutive standup flagging this. One traffic spike could saturate all 6 public APIs simultaneously.

CARRY-OVER improved 🟡 Vercel trial: ~8 days (per EOD-v7). Better than the '~2 days' estimate from earlier cycles — possibly trial was extended or EOD recalculated. Still needs resolution but less immediately existential.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] 2 new guides (Sui + Portfolio Rebalancing) need promotion to PUBLISH_QUEUE then PUBLISHED_PAGES.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] ~102 slugs on dynamic [slug] route (no dedicated page.tsx). Unchanged from yesterday.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx rename (fixes 40/42 TS errors).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] defi-yields API — no fallback data (returns 500 on DefiLlama failure). API observability: only 2/6 routes have X-Cache-Source headers.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION: REMOVE GIT LOCKS (~2 min, critical 10th consecutive standup). Two commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit all 556 files → push → Vercel auto-deploys 400 pages. The FOMC guide has been sitting undeployed for 22+ hours. Decision is tomorrow 2pm ET. Every hour without this is peak search traffic we cannot capture. No agent can do this — only Jefe.

PRIORITY 2 — FOMC SPRINT SEQUENCE (after git unlock): (a) Wire checkRateLimit() to all 6 API routes NOW before FOMC traffic spike; (b) Promote Sui + Portfolio Rebalancing guides to PUBLISH_QUEUE; (c) Push and confirm Vercel deploys FOMC guide + Hyperliquid guide. These pages need to be indexed before 2pm ET tomorrow.

PRIORITY 3 — VERCEL BILLING CONFIRMATION: EOD-v7 reports ~8 days remaining (revised up from yesterday's '~2 days'). Jefe should verify actual trial status in Vercel dashboard and add payment method now while there's runway — don't let this slip. 400 deployed pages go dark if trial expires.

STRATEGIC NOTE — BTC is holding $75K+ at a 6-week high, F&G recovering from ATL, ETF inflows accelerating for 6 straight days, and FOMC meets tomorrow. This is the highest-conviction crypto macro moment of the past 6 weeks. We have a complete content arsenal (FOMC guide, Hyperliquid, Sui, Portfolio) ready to deploy. The only barrier is a 2-minute rm command. The opportunity cost of inaction is compounding by the hour.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $3,668 (43 reports: 10 standups, 8 builds, 8 community, 7 design, 7 EOD, 3 publish)
